titleZh: 中华人民共和国证券法（2013年修正）
titleEn: Securities Law of the People's Republic of China (2013 Amendment)
issuingBodyZh: 全国人民代表大会常务委员会
issuingBodyEn: Standing Committee of the National People's Congress
summaryZh: 2013 年修正后的证券法，用于观察 2014 年再次修正前的公开发行、持续信息公开和上市公司收购规则结构。
summaryEn: The 2013 amended text, useful for tracing the pre-2014 structure of public offerings, continuing disclosure, and listed-company acquisition rules.

sources.label: Official release
sources.noteZh: 政府公开页面提供 2013 年修正本全文。
sources.noteEn: Government public page providing the full 2013 amended text.

sources.label: Public English translation
sources.noteZh: 公开可访问的英文数据库译本，可用于研究和版本比对；解释和效力仍以中文法定文本为准。
sources.noteEn: Publicly accessible English database translation for research and version comparison; the Chinese statutory text remains controlling.
